# NepDate

> Zero-dependency .NET library for Bikram Sambat (BS) date conversion, smart parsing, fiscal year, calendar metadata, and bulk operations. MIT licensed. Current version: 2.0.7.

## Install

```
dotnet add package NepDate
```

NuGet: https://www.nuget.org/packages/NepDate/
GitHub: https://github.com/RajuPrasai/NepDate

## Key facts

- Primary type: `NepaliDate` (readonly partial struct in `NepDate` namespace)
- Performance: 4.55 ns/op BS-to-AD conversion, zero heap allocations
- Supported range: 1901/01/01 BS through 2199/12/last-day BS
- Calendar metadata (tithi, holidays, events): 2001-2089 BS only
- Zero external runtime dependencies (Newtonsoft and STJ internalized via PrivateAssets=all)
- Targets: .NET Standard 2.0, net8.0

| https://nepdate.rajuprasai.com.np/changelog.html | Version history |

- https://nepdate.rajuprasai.com.np/llms-full.txt - full documentation in plain text
